name: Prisma + PostgreSQL
description: Set up Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL from zero: schema definition, initial migration, seed script, and connection pooling with PgBouncer-compatible connection strings.

steps.description: Check Node version and existing database dependencies
Define User, Post, and Session models with relations
Add DATABASE_URL with connection string (includes ?connection_limit=5 for pooling)
Ensure .env is gitignored, add prisma/migrations to version control
Create seed script with 3 sample users and posts using createMany
Create singleton PrismaClient with global instance for dev hot reload
Add prisma.seed script pointing to tsx prisma/seed.ts
Seed the database and verify data

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Type-safe ORM with schema-first migrations, seed data, and connection pooling
